'''Yin Water Snake''' is the 30th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 癸 Mizunoto (yin water, the luna-aligned face of winter), and its branch is 巳 Mi, the [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's water overcomes the branch's fire, a relationship of restraint.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Water Dragon]] (node 29) and [[Yang Wood Horse]] (node 31).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Mizunoto (癸)]] — yin water
* '''Branch:''' [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] — yin fire
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' winter

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Water Dragon]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Wood Horse]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q905297}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
